description_long: This object is a modern vehicle wheel featuring a black, low-profile tire mounted on a sleek alloy rim. The rim has a five-spoke design with a matte black finish, and the spokes are wide and slightly concave, giving the wheel a sporty appearance. Visible behind the spokes is a ventilated disc brake rotor, suggesting the wheel is designed for a high-performance car. The tire tread is worn and features a symmetrical pattern with shallow grooves and some surface wear, indicating prior use. The outer sidewall of the tire displays subtle branding and technical markings. The overall construction combines robust rubber for the tire and metal alloy for the rim, with a central hub area for lug nut attachment.
description: A sporty black vehicle wheel with a five-spoke alloy rim and a worn, symmetrical tread tire. The design includes a visible disc brake and technical markings on the tire sidewall.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full width of the tire and the worn symmetrical tread pattern.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the five-spoke alloy rim, central hub, and visible disc brake rotor.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the tire's width and tread wear.
description_view_3: Rear view of the wheel, focusing on the inner rim structure and brake rotor details.
attribute_spoke_pattern: Five wide, evenly spaced spokes in a radial arrangement with a slight concave profile.
attribute_rim_design: Matte black alloy rim with a deep lip, pronounced spoke edges, and a visible central hub area; no decorative beadlock or multi-piece construction.
attribute_lug_nut_configuration: Five lug nut holes arranged in a circular, evenly spaced pattern around the central hub.
attribute_tire_tread_pattern: Symmetrical tread with shallow, straight grooves and minor surface wear; no directional or blocky features.
